args.Description: "Refining the Performance Dashboard with standardized card styles, cleaner typography, and minimalist spacing. Removing \"shouty\" italics and oversized bold styles. Standardizing colors and borders for a professional look."
args.Instruction: "Update StatCard, Header, Gap sections, Charts, Feedback sidebar, and Heatmap for a more professional, minimalist look. Use border-subtle and bg-surface. Remove font-black in most places. Use accent-brand for primary highlights."
